src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the @Generated annotation to reflect the new JHipster version.
Reformat the annotation interface definition to use a single-line brace style.
Explicitly exclude H2ConsoleAutoConfiguration to prevent the H2 web console from starting, likely for security or configuration alignment in newer Spring Boot versions.
Update the import path for LiquibaseProperties to match the new package structure in Spring Boot 3.x.
Rename the logger instance variable from 'log' to 'LOG' to adhere to standard Java naming conventions for static final fields.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(...);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declarations with 'var' for local variables where the type is obvious, leveraging Java 10+ features.
Extract the application name property into a dedicated variable to improve code readability and reuse in the startup log message.
Reformat the multi-line string literal into a Java 15+ text block for better readability and alignment.
Realign string concatenation in @Pointcut annotations for consistent indentation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added leading spaces to continuation lines in within() expressions.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Realign method call arguments in logger.error() calls for consistent indentation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Moved opening parenthesis of logger.error() to the same line as the method call and aligned arguments.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Prevent potential NullPointerException when logging the exception cause in production profile.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed e.getCause() to String.valueOf(e.getCause()) in the else branch of logAfterThrowing.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use local variable type inference for cleaner code in the logAround method.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced explicit Logger type with var for the log variable declaration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Introduce a nested configuration class to manage Liquibase-specific properties within the application properties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added private final Liquibase field and public static class Liquibase with asyncStart property.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor logger instance to follow standard static final naming convention.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'private final Logger log' to 'private static final Logger LOG'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use the 'var' keyword for local variable type inference to reduce verbosity.
Replace deprecated single marker access with the new marker list API introduced in newer SLF4J versions.
Rename constant from SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for consistency or clarity.
Remove fields and setter methods for GitProperties and BuildProperties that are no longer used in the class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the KeyGenerator bean definition that depended on the removed properties.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import statements to reflect package relocations in newer Spring Boot versions.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove import statements for classes that are no longer used in the file.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use the `var` keyword for local variable declaration to reduce verbosity.

Replace explicit type declaration with var keyword for local variable.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable inference.
Remove the explicit registration of Hibernate5JakartaModule from the Jackson configuration.

Refactor logger instance to use static final field convention.
Introduce configuration property to toggle between synchronous and asynchronous Liquibase startup.
Convert List contexts to comma-delimited string to match Liquibase API requirements.
